summary: Dashboard successfully implements the empty state with proper index onboarding flow and meets core functional requirements. Visual treatment uses appropriate authenticated UI styling rather than public marketing palette, which is correct for logged-in surfaces. Minor advisory issues include generic neutral styling and missing mobile drawer verification.

violations.description: Dashboard uses generic neutral gray/white styling typical of authenticated interfaces rather than a distinctive visual identity, though this may be appropriate for logged-in surfaces versus public marketing routes
Mobile drawer navigation functionality cannot be verified in this desktop viewport screenshot, though the spec requires mobile narrow contract compliance at 390px

actions: Verify mobile drawer navigation works correctly at 390px viewport as specified in screen spec Mobile Narrow Contract
Consider whether authenticated dashboard surfaces should maintain more visual brand continuity with public surfaces while preserving appropriate UI/UX separation
